title: 3000pcs 3mm ss12 Jelly AB Flat Back Round 14 Facets Resin Rhinestones Arts and Crafts Embellishment Gems (Rose Gold AB C71)
features: Flat back round 'Resin' rhinestones by MajorCrafts are Ideal for embellishing various items including diamond paintings, jewellery, mobile phone cases, shoes, clothes, scrapbooks, nail art, body art, home decor and card making etc. They can also be used as wedding or party confetti.

Our resin rhinestones have many facets that enables them to reflect light which results in a lot of shine and sparkle. These rhinestones are not self-adhesive and they are not hot-fix (separate glue is needed to affix them).
'Majorcrafts' is a UK registered trademark: UK00003145936
description: Flat back resin rhinestones by MajorCrafts are ideal for embellishing various arts and crafts projects including card making, scrap-booking, jewellery making, diamond painting, costume making and nail art decoration etc.
